archetype: Organic & Earthy with Vibrant Marketplace Accents

header.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-gray-100 transition-all duration-300
header.layout: flex justify-between items-center h-16 md:h-20 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 max-w-7xl mx-auto

chips.become_partner: hidden sm:flex bg-[#C05C3D]/10 text-[#C05C3D] hover:bg-[#C05C3D]/20 rounded-full px-4 py-1.5 text-sm font-semibold transition-colors items-center gap-1
chips.login: bg-[#1A251E] text-white rounded-full px-4 sm:px-5 py-1.5 sm:py-2 text-sm font-semibold hover:bg-black transition-colors flex items-center gap-2
chips.language: text-[#1A251E] hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-full px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-semibold transition-colors flex items-center gap-1

hero.container: relative w-full min-h-[360px] md:min-h-[480px] bg-gradient-to-br from-[#F4F5F2] via-[#FFE8D6] to-[#FFDEC7] flex flex-col items-center justify-center pt-24 pb-12 overflow-hidden
hero.title: font-CabinetGrotesk text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black text-[#1A251E] text-center max-w-3xl mb-8 z-10

search_bar.wrapper: w-full max-w-2xl bg-white rounded-full p-2 shadow-[0_12px_40px_rgba(192,92,61,0.15)] flex items-center z-10 mx-4
search_bar.location: flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 border-r border-gray-200 text-gray-400 cursor-not-allowed group relative
search_bar.input: flex-1 px-4 py-2 outline-none text-base md:text-lg text-[#1A251E] placeholder:text-gray-400 bg-transparent
search_bar.button: bg-[#C05C3D] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-semibold hover:bg-[#E0402A] transition-colors flex items-center gap-2 shadow-md hover:shadow-lg

categories_nav.wrapper: sticky top-16 md:top-20 z-40 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md py-4 border-b border-gray-100
categories_nav.scroll_container: flex overflow-x-auto hide-scrollbar gap-3 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 max-w-7xl mx-auto pb-1
categories_nav.pill_base: px-5 py-2 rounded-full border whitespace-nowrap cursor-pointer transition-all duration-200 text-sm font-semibold shadow-sm
categories_nav.pill_inactive: bg-white border-gray-200 text-[#4B5563] hover:border-[#C05C3D] hover:text-[#C05C3D] hover:-translate-y-0.5

restaurant_card.wrapper: group relative flex flex-col bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:shadow-[0_20px_40px_-15px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] transition-all duration-300 border border-gray-100 hover:-translate-y-1 cursor-pointer
restaurant_card.image_container: relative w-full aspect-[4/3] sm:h-48 overflow-hidden bg-gray-100
restaurant_card.image: w-full h-full object-cover transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:scale-105
restaurant_card.badges_top_right: absolute top-3 right-3 flex flex-col gap-2 items-end
restaurant_card.delivery_badge: bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-sm px-2.5 py-1 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold text-[#1A251E] shadow-sm flex items-center gap-1
restaurant_card.logo_wrapper: absolute -bottom-6 left-4 w-12 h-12 rounded-full border-4 border-white shadow-sm bg-white overflow-hidden z-10
restaurant_card.content_area: pt-8 pb-5 px-4 flex flex-col gap-1.5
restaurant_card.title: font-CabinetGrotesk text-lg md:text-xl font-bold text-[#1A251E] group-hover:text-[#C05C3D] transition-colors line-clamp-1
restaurant_card.rating: flex items-center gap-1 text-[#F59E0B] font-bold bg-[#F59E0B]/10 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-md

how_it_works.grid: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-8 max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4
how_it_works.icon_wrapper: w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-sm border border-[#E5E7EB] flex items-center justify-center text-[#C05C3D] rotate-3 hover:rotate-0 transition-transform
how_it_works.title: font-CabinetGrotesk font-bold text-lg text-[#1A251E]

faq.title: font-CabinetGrotesk text-3xl font-bold text-center text-[#1A251E] mb-10

partner_cta_bottom.wrapper: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#C05C3D]/10 to-[#F59E0B]/10 rounded-3xl p-8 sm:p-10 text-center max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-16 flex flex-col items-center gap-4 border border-[#C05C3D]/20
partner_cta_bottom.title: font-CabinetGrotesk text-2xl font-bold text-[#1A251E]
partner_cta_bottom.button: mt-2 bg-[#1A251E] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-semibold hover:bg-black transition-colors flex items-center gap-2

footer.grid: max-w-7xl mx-auto grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-12 mb-12
footer.heading: font-CabinetGrotesk font-bold text-lg mb-4 text-white
footer.link: text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition-colors text-sm py-1 block
footer.bottom_bar: max-w-7xl mx-auto border-t border-white/10 pt-8 flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-4 text-sm text-gray-400

images.description: Delicious pizza cover image for restaurant card
Gourmet burger cover image for restaurant card
Sushi platter cover image for restaurant card

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the landing page in a single file `LandingPage.js` (or current main page file) using React and Tailwind CSS.
Implement the Header as fixed, overlapping the Hero section initially. Use glassmorphism on scroll.
Hero section must have a prominent search bar (Nə yemək istəyirsən?) with a disabled Bakı location selector (show tooltip 'coming soon').
Category pills must be sticky below the header after scrolling past the hero. Use horizontal scroll for mobile.
Map over existing partner data (`/api/partners/public`) and render Wolt-style cards. If `cover_url` or `logo_url` are missing, fallback to the media URLs provided here.
Ensure 'Become a Partner' is no longer the main hero CTA, but exists as a chip in the header and a small card block above the footer.
Use framer-motion or CSS IntersectionObserver for fade-up stagger animations on the restaurant grid.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Keep typography scalable and respect the spacing/layout metrics provided.
